ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the stock symbol */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN of the stock symbol */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stock symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbols_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for sub-sectors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the stock as favorite */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being marked as favorite */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the stock was marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., update close, delete) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view trades, update trades) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission mapping */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role being mapped to a permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission being mapped to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
